items.title: Serve client build from server in production
items.description: Add fastifyStatic for client dist + SPA fallback route for all non-API paths. Required for Docker deployment.

items.title: First-user-becomes-admin / setup token
items.description: On fresh instance, first registered user becomes instance admin. Or env var ADMIN_SETUP_TOKEN required for first registration.

items.title: Server invite links
items.description: Generate shareable invite links for servers. Optional invite-only registration mode for the instance.

items.title: Lock down CORS for production
items.description: Configure allowed origins from BABELR_DOMAIN env var instead of origin: true.

items.title: Rate limiting on all public endpoints
items.description: Add @fastify/rate-limit. Tighter limits on auth endpoints, moderate on messaging, light on reads.

items.title: Production error handler (no stack traces)
items.description: Custom Fastify error handler that sanitizes 500 responses in production. Log full error server-side.

items.title: Run DB migrations on Docker startup
items.description: Docker entrypoint runs drizzle-kit migrate before starting server.

items.title: Database connection pooling config
items.description: Configure postgres.js pool size (max connections) for production workloads.

items.title: Federation inbox rate limiting
items.description: Per-instance rate limits on AP inbox endpoints to prevent federation spam.

items.title: Email verification on registration
items.description: Verify email before activating account. Prevents spam registrations.

items.title: Graceful shutdown handler
items.description: Close WS connections, drain DB pool, finish pending deliveries on SIGTERM.

items.title: NodeInfo endpoint for Mastodon compatibility
items.description: /.well-known/nodeinfo for instance discovery by Mastodon and other fediverse software.

items.title: Tauri desktop application
items.description: Native desktop app using Tauri (Rust + OS webview). Connects to configurable server URL. System tray, native notifications, auto-update, deep links (babelr://invite/CODE). Same React client, no fork.
